opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: I've been vomiting constantly since this morning, I have severe diarrhea, and my boss says I'm fired if I don't get a doctor's note tonight before my shift starts.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: I need a doctor's note tonight so I can be excused from my shift — I work in food service and my boss won't accept me being off without one.

symptom_narrative.character: throwing up over and over and watery diarrhoea, feeling really nauseous and a bit hot/feverish
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: severe — I can't get away from the bathroom
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: keeps coming in waves through the day
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: small sips of oral rehydration fluid help a little
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: drinking too much at once brings the vomiting straight back
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: nausea and a low-grade feverish feeling
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: can't work and can't leave the house — stuck near the toilet all day

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: works as a food handler in a commercial food facility; a family member was recently unwell with the same kind of tummy symptoms; very worried about losing the job if off without a certificate.

objective_data_offered.value: looks pale and tired on video, keeping a sick bag nearby
still able to take small sips of fluid and still passing urine as normal
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: patient self-report, not a clinician hydration assessment
subjective feeling of fever, no measured reading offered
